div.p: ArchetypeSignature.fields.f0 -> SortedVec.buffer.slot0: "data_ptr" { style.stroke: orange style.stroke-width: 3 style.animated: true source-arrowhead: circle target-arrowhead: triangle }

pre.code: input -> step1: "QuickSort/StableSort" step1 -> step2: "dedup()" step2 -> result: "Compute Hash"

div.p: SortedVec.buffer -> BinarySearch: "View as Slice"
Properties: |md

ul.li: Identity is based on the set of components, not insertion order.
Must be strictly sorted for Binary Search compatibility.
Duplicate component types are strictly disallowed.
Hash is cached at construction; Mutation requires re-hash. | { near: top-right style.fill: "#F8F8F8" style.stroke-dash: 2 style.font-size: 14 }
